pages.title: SuperBot — 485 commands for your Discord server
SuperBot — 485 commands for your Discord server

playwright.reason: Chromium at /opt/pw-browsers/chromium-1194 returns net::ERR_CONNECTION_RESET on every navigation, both direct and via the agent proxy (--proxy-server=http://127.0.0.1:37729), with both networkidle and domcontentloaded waits. The agent proxy resets Chromium's tunneled TLS to railway.app even though stdlib urllib/curl reach the same host fine. Real-browser console errors could not be collected. Static 2-pass crawl captured the full server-rendered no-JS graph; console_errors are [] from HTTP crawl.

task_battery.task: Find what the bot does and its features
task_battery.notes: Home states purpose ('One bot for your whole server ... 485 commands across 43 features'). Nav 'Features' -> /features grid (43 features in 8 areas); each feature detail (e.g. /features/ai) lists its command set with descriptions. Real, specific content.

Nav 'Commands' -> /commands is the command reference: 365 command detail pages linked ('Every command the bot exposes, straight from its data'), searchable/filterable by area. Each command has its own page (/commands/<name>).

task_battery.task: Find get-started / contact (add the bot, submit an idea)
task_battery.notes: Primary CTA 'Add to Discord' -> Discord OAuth authorize (external, client_id=1403818430758654132) on every page. 'Submit an idea' nav -> /submit (1 form; READ-ONLY, not submitted). No other contact form.

task_battery.task: Navigate back home from a deep page
task_battery.notes: Depth-2 feature detail /features/ai links back to home (SuperBot logo) and to the /features index. Global nav on every page; no orphans found.

task_battery.task: Confirm marketing data is REAL (from live feed) vs placeholder banner
task_battery.notes: FEED IS LIVE. Home: 'Public reference - live from the bot's own data ... every number and command below is read straight from the bot's committed data' with concrete totals (485 commands / 43 features / 12 games / 8 areas). No feed-failure/fallback/stale banner (the only .sb-status-banner is a 'Ready to add SuperBot?' CTA). /status: 'All systems operational, as of build e0fd8ef7 2026-07-11T11:53:11Z'. No placeholder content.
